summary: Completed testing of P0 features: Effective Start Date Bug Fix, Manager Traded Toggle, and Master Admin Account Value. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend features verified through code review and partial UI testing.
critical_code_review_comments: Effective Start Date filtering is correctly implemented in generateDailyProjectionForMonth function (lines 174-187)
Manager Traded Toggle (Switch) is correctly shown only for Master Admin simulating a specific licensee (line 2752)
Master Admin account value correctly includes licensee_funds via include_managed_licensees parameter in calculations.py

success_rate.frontend: 90% (verified via code review and partial UI testing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features verified: 1) Effective Start Date - generateDailyProjectionForMonth filters days before effective_start_date; 2) Manager Traded Toggle - Switch component visible for Master Admin when simulating licensee (line 2752-2765); 3) Master Admin Account Value - /api/profit/summary returns licensee_funds and licensee_count; 4) /api/profit/master-admin-breakdown returns detailed breakdown with personal_account_value, licensee_funds, total_account_value, and licensee_breakdown array.

effective_start_date_bug_fix.details: generateDailyProjectionForMonth function correctly filters days before effective_start_date (lines 174-187). For licensees, the Daily Projection table starts from the effective start date.

manager_traded_toggle.details: Switch toggle visible in Manager Traded column for Master Admin when simulating a licensee. Toggle uses handleToggleTradeOverride function to update trade status via /api/admin/licenses/{id}/trade-overrides endpoint.

master_admin_account_value.details: /api/profit/summary returns licensee_funds ($36,611.10) and licensee_count (9) for Master Admin. Account value ($55,940.25) includes personal funds + licensee funds.

master_admin_financial_breakdown.details: /api/profit/master-admin-breakdown returns: personal_account_value ($19,329.15), licensee_funds ($36,611.10), total_account_value ($55,940.25), licensee_count (9), and licensee_breakdown array with details per licensee.

daily_projection_columns_for_licensees.details: Licensees see columns: Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Manager Traded. Non-licensees see: Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Actual Profit, Commission, P/L Diff.
